title: Minshal
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''minshal''' was a type of creature grown by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] for its shell. Once the shell was discarded by the creature, it was used as a form of shelter. [[Slavery/Legends|Slaves]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bimmiel/Legends|Bimmiel]] lived in a minshal village. After the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the Yuuzhan Vong established many of them on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
